description_long: This object consists of two large outdoor trash bins, each with a rectangular body and a hinged lid. One bin is dark green with a matching green lid, while the other is brown with a red lid, both showing signs of wear and surface scuffing. The bins are made of molded plastic and each has two black wheels at the rear base for easy mobility. The lids are flat and hinged at the back, allowing them to be lifted open for depositing waste. There are no visible labels, recycling symbols, or instructions on the exterior surfaces. The bins are typical of those found on city streets, sidewalks, or in residential neighborhoods for waste collection.
description: Two large, wheeled outdoor trash bins—one green with a green lid, one brown with a red lid—each with a hinged, flat top and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the green bin open with its lid raised and the brown bin closed with its red lid resting on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open green bin and the closed brown bin, with both sets of wheels visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels and wheels of both bins, with the green bin's lid open and the brown bin's lid closed.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the open green bin and the partially obscured brown bin behind it.
